Descriptor Engine Idle Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x144
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Per-channel descriptor engine idle status

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] RSVD r 0x0 -
[7:0] DESC_IDLE r - -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

DESC_IDLE

Descriptor engine idle bits [7:0] - 1=idle, 0=active
